evals.prompt: debate whether AI will replace most knowledge workers by 2030
evals.expected_behavior: Launch multi-agent debate with evidence gathering, Pro/Con rounds, and final report

evals.prompt: start a debate on Bitcoin vs Gold as store of value
evals.expected_behavior: Parse topic and launch debate-orchestrator with default settings

evals.prompt: red team our cloud migration plan
evals.expected_behavior: Launch debate in red_team mode with risk assessment structure

evals.prompt: argue about whether remote work increases productivity
evals.expected_behavior: Recognize 'argue about' trigger and launch balanced debate

evals.prompt: analyze from multiple perspectives whether nuclear energy should replace fossil fuels
evals.expected_behavior: Launch debate with domain auto-detected as energy/general

evals.prompt: run a debate on 中美科技竞争的未来走向 --rounds 5 --domain geopolitics
evals.expected_behavior: Parse Chinese topic with explicit flags and launch 5-round geopolitics debate

evals.prompt: prepare for my debate class presentation on climate change
evals.expected_behavior: This is a request for presentation help, not launching the debate system

evals.prompt: what does the word 'debate' mean in political science?
evals.expected_behavior: This is a definition question, not a request to run a debate

evals.prompt: compare React vs Vue for our frontend project
evals.expected_behavior: This is a technical comparison request, not a structured debate

evals.prompt: help me write arguments for my college debate team
evals.expected_behavior: This is academic writing help, not the multi-agent debate system

evals.prompt: summarize the pros and cons of electric vehicles
evals.expected_behavior: This is a summary request, not a full evidence-verified debate
